text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I slept like a baby today... Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That's weird—I feel like I was reeled in over
here or something...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Three Goddesses? Were you the ones who
called me here?
